title: Trying out YJIT in Ruby 3.2
summary: This isn't going to be a deep dive into YJIT, benchmarking it and such like, just a few quick tips to get started with it yourself. First things first, though, some context! What's YJIT? Yet another entry in the Yet Another series, YJIT is a new just in time compiler for Ruby. Wh
